name: pexip-infinity-skills
description: Agent Skills for the Pexip Infinity platform — operator runbooks and developer reference for the management admin APIs (Configuration / Status / History / Command), event sinks, external policy, and room integration. Works in any Agent Skills host (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, Cursor, Kiro, …). This can be paired with the pexip-mgmnt MCP server at https://github.com/Josh-E-S/pexip-mgmt-mcp for ready-made tools, or call the same Pexip REST endpoints directly from your own code.
